error_signature: Existing execution data is too large
title: Execution data size exceeds limit in chat trigger node
symptom: When attaching a large number of files (e.g., 40), n8n throws an error stating 'Existing execution data is too large'.
not_this_if: Attaching fewer files (2-3 files) or files under the size limit
root_cause: n8n has a default payload size limit of 16MB for execution data. When the total size of the attached files exceeds this limit, the error occurs.
fix_steps: Add the line 'N8N_PAYLOAD_SIZE_MAX=268435456' to increase the limit to 256MB.
Ensure that 'N8N_FORMDATA_FILE_SIZE_MAX' is set to a value less than or equal to 'N8N_PAYLOAD_SIZE_MAX'.
Restart the n8n service to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Increase the payload size limit in your docker-compose.yml and restart n8n.
